# To do

# Filters
Filtering on heart rate would be useful
Filters should be dynamic (date, distance pace always shown, others addable)
Presets - need to be able to load these. This should be made clearer
Should be able to got from Rostered run to Map easily

## Sports 
Should not list every sport on the screen - selection should be hidden

## Scatter
Add age-grading as a choice
Showing the colour names is a bit unfriendly - most users have never heard of Viridis. Also having these shown as buttons takes a lot of space, maybe they should condensed into a drop down.

## Roster 
Make it possible to open a run in Strava from the roster
Make it possible to remove all runs from the roster

## Layout
It should be possible to tile the layout as well as tab it - tabs contiaining tiles would be good. This is a big change this should be user-configurable and saveable

## Series plot
Get rid of smoothing
Don't show the first 0.1 miles of data as this is noisy
Add moving average - show a rolling average of the last 0.25 miles
Make it possible to temporarily hide runs in the roster
Make is possible to remove runs from the roster if they aren't already removed

## Settings
Allow user to specify 

## Usability
If the user is connected to Strava already, take them through to the data screen rather than showing the initial covering page
Give user the option to re-sync everything and also just to clear their data if they want

## Long term ideas
Gender comparison chart/table
Optimum pacing model - if you ran optimally, how would your pace have differed?
Time delta plot - allow one of the runs to be specified as a baseline and the time delta (for runs where the x-axis is distance) or distance delta (for runs where the x-axis is time) to be shown. Being able to overlay time delta and pacing data is important. Actually maybe the series plot should be generic and allow multiple plotting and arranging.
